# Blast

**Summary**: A bioinformatics tool used to compare primary biological sequence information.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-arslan|Arslan, 2015]] used BLAST to compare 18S rDNA sequences against the NCBI database.
